issue.title: Remove constexpr from owner_less and owner_before

discussion.p: LEWG decided to remove `constexpr` from `owner_before` and `owner_less`.

li.p: Modify , class template `shared_ptr` synopsis, as indicated:

blockquote.pre: template<class U> constexpr bool owner_before(const shared_ptr<U>& b) const noexcept; template<class U> constexpr bool owner_before(const weak_ptr<U>& b) const noexcept;

li.p: Modify , class template `weak_ptr` synopsis, as indicated:

blockquote.pre: template<class U> constexpr bool owner_before(const shared_ptr<U>& b) const noexcept; template<class U> constexpr bool owner_before(const weak_ptr<U>& b) const noexcept;

li.p: Modify , class template `owner_less` synopsis, as indicated:
